message:
Add deployment scripts for magic-kingdom

- adopt-serf-state.sh: symlink bridge for Harbor's serf-state dirs
- dashboard.service: systemd unit (uvicorn on :6060)
- update.sh: provoked-poll script for rapid dev updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+# Creates agent-state -> serf-state symlinks for Harbor compatibility.
+#
+# Harbor writes transcript data to agent/serf-state/ but the dashboard
+# code expects agent/agent-state/. This script bridges the gap with
+# relative symlinks. Re-runnable — skips directories that already have
+# an agent-state link or directory.
+#
+# Usage: ./scripts/adopt-serf-state.sh /data/serf-evals/runs
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+data_dir="${1:?Usage: $0 <data-dir>}"
+
+find "$data_dir" -type d -name serf-state -path "*/agent/serf-state" | while read -r sd; do
+  link="${sd%serf-state}agent-state"
+  [ -e "$link" ] && continue
+  ln -s serf-state "$link"
+  echo "linked: $link -> serf-state"
+done

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+# Pull latest code and restart the dashboard.
+# Usage: ./scripts/update.sh
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+cd /opt/harbor-eval-analysis-dashboard
+
+git pull --ff-only
+.venv/bin/pip install -q -r requirements.txt
+
+# Adopt any new serf-state dirs from recent eval runs
+./scripts/adopt-serf-state.sh /data/serf-evals/runs
+
+sudo systemctl restart dashboard
+echo "Dashboard updated and restarted."
